name: GMBapi
description:
‍

Source: G2

Features 

  • Allows businesses to update their business information (like hours, location, and photos) across Google in real-time.
  • Simplifies the management of multiple locations or listings through batch requests and updates.
  • Provides detailed analytics on how customers interact with business listings, including views, clicks, and reviews.
  • Enables businesses to respond to customer reviews directly through the API, improving customer engagement and reputation management.
  • Facilitates direct messaging between businesses and customers who find their business listing on Google Search.

Benefits 

  • Ensures that business information is accurate and up-to-date across Google Search, Maps, and other Google services, enhancing online visibility.
  • Enables businesses to engage directly with customers through reviews, messages, and updates, fostering better relationships.
  • Streamlines the management of business listings, saving time on manual updates and ensuring consistency across all locations.
  • Provides actionable insights into customer behavior and listing performance, helping businesses make informed decisions to optimize their online presence.
  • Offers secure access to manage business data, ensuring compliance with Google's guidelines and policies for business listings.

Pros 

  • Managing different location under a single dashboard is very convenient 

Cons 

  • Not enough automations for review response feature, need to build it further

‍

Priced at $3 Per Month

‍
